text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Done with our shopping, Super Creek and I are
heading toward the station when we see a crowd
gathered in front of a giant screen.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
"Umamusume Popularity Contest"? That sounds
like quite an interesting show!

text_block_list.name: Popular Star
text_block_list.text:
I just know Oguri Cap will be the winner! She's got
overwhelming strength and her rivals don't even
faze her!

text_block_list.name: Popular Comedian
text_block_list.text:
And Super Creek is right up there with her! No
doubt in my mind, the popularity polls are going
to be split right down the middle during the next
race!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
They both have a lot of fans, that's for sure! Sales
of their plushies and other merchandise are
neck-to-neck too!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm... dreaming, Trainer. I never thought
there'd come a day when so many people would
cheer for me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
All these races I've been through with you, and all
my running alongside the others... So much has
happened...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen served as a huge turning point
for Super Creek. As for the next goal she should
set her sights on...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer... What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: What should you do? Sounds to me like you've done plenty! Everyone's hollerin' about Creek 'n' Oguri dis, Creek 'n' Oguri dat!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam! You're not... upset, are you?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Course I am! The whole world's got eyes for the
two of you and nobody else! What am I, chopped
carrots?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But you're the one at the top of my hit list! I'm workin' my tail off, but you seem fine just pitter-patterin' down the road. You run outta gas or something?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tamtam...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ya might think this's over, but I'm just gettin'
started... Watch your back, or else White
Lightning'll flash right past ya.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: All right, I'm leavin'! Later!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Bye, Tamtam! Watch out for cars on your way
back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Craaash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taken aback by Super Creek's unwaveringly
maternal response to her challenge, Tamamo
Cross trips over herself. Super Creek and I help
her up before continuing on our way.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh? Isn't that Inari over there?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, now we're talkin'! Business is boomin' for
Inari One's Special Express Delivery Service!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Will you really be all right carrying all that on
your own?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry 'bout it! I'll just think of it as trainin'.
Hell, add a few more to the pile!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
We all gotta do our parts if we wanna take down
the big baddie.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, Inari too?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I'm so hungry I can't stand it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, Oguri, are you okay? You look rather
unsteady.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah... It's just, no matter how much I eat, I
stay starving.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I train real hard, then eat a lot... then train real
hard, then eat a lot... It's like a never-ending,
inescapable loop!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Why not take a break, then? You won't be as
hungry if you have a rest! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I know, but I just can't sit still. Whenever I think
of the Arima Kinen I lost, it feels like some
invisible force is pushing me forward...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Argh, just while we've been talking, the urge to
start exercising has gotten unbearable!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Eat, run, eat!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Even Oguri is at it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
A part of me has grown complacent. I thought I
could just spend every day with you, leisurely
taking care of everyone...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But it feels like a wall has formed between me and
them... and I've realized something.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't look after them unless our hearts are in
sync. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I want to keep moving forward with you, Trainer! I
want to run alongside the others in another race
like the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Okay! As long as I have everyone's support and
you by my side, I won't lose! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Super Creek smiles, the look on her face
exudes the same warmth as always.
